title: Vyla
subtitle: Ad-Free Movie & Show Streaming
description: A fast, clean way to stream free movies and shows from multiple sources in one place. The site itself has zero ads, pop-ups, or trackers.
features: Netflix-Style UI with full-screen overlays.
Massive source pool for reliable streaming.
No sign-up required for instant watching.
Full PWA support for a native app experience.

title: Vyla Player API
subtitle: Cloudflare Pages API for TMDB
description: A Cloudflare Pages API for scraping and streaming movies & TV shows via TMDB ID. Aggregates sources from 8 providers, proxies streams to handle CORS, and serves a zero-UI embedded player.
features: Fetches streaming sources for movies using a TMDB ID by scraping multiple providers in real time.
Retrieves TV episode streams by season and episode, enabling precise episode-level playback sourcing.
Provides a CORS-compliant proxy with support for header injection and m3u8 URL rewriting for smooth streaming.
Enables direct media file downloads from resolved video URLs with optional filename control.
Returns structured metadata for downloadable media, including file information without initiating the download.

title: Vyla Games API
subtitle: Game Discovery & Download API
description: A modern Flask-based game discovery and download API. Scrapes game data from koyso.com and provides a responsive web interface with full JSON API support.
features: Scrape all games from Koyso with pagination support.
Search games by title or keywords.
Retrieve game details including title, description, file size, and cover image.
Generate final download links using timestamp and secret key.
Optional automatic downloading of selected games.

title: Pyla
subtitle: Game Discovery & Download API
description: Pyla Games - Modern game discovery powered by the Pyla Games API
features: Scrape all games from Koyso with pagination support.
Search games by title or keywords.
Retrieve game details including title, description, file size, and cover image.
Generate final download links using timestamp and secret key.
Optional automatic downloading of selected games.
The site provides a genre-based game discovery system with dynamically loaded collections and skeleton loading for smooth performance.
It includes a real-time search bar that lets users instantly find games without leaving the page.
A fullscreen overlay menu offers quick navigation to all major pages in a mobile-friendly layout.
Games open in an interactive modal viewer with details, bookmarking, and drag-based controls.
An embedded iframe game launcher allows users to play online games with fullscreen and new-tab options.

title: Vexa-AI
subtitle: Free AI REST API
description: Free REST API for text and image generation. No account, no API key, no setup required — just send a request and get a response.
features: Free text and image generation with no authentication required.
No account or API key needed.
Simple REST endpoints for easy integration.
MIT licensed and open source.

title: Vexa Chat
subtitle: Free AI Chat
description: A modern AI chat application with image generation capabilities, built with Firebase authentication and Cloudinary storage.
features: Interactive chat interface with AI models supporting text conversations with markdown formatting and code highlighting.
Image generation with style presets (Spring, Caricature, Watercolor, etc.) and discover prompts.
User authentication with Firebase, saving chat history and preferences.
Chat history management with recent chats, search functionality, and ability to start new conversations.
Customizable settings with theme selection (light/dark/system), font size adjustment, default model selection, and data controls.

title: Soluna
subtitle: Keyless Script Hub
description: A central hub for over 20+ keyless scripts, providing easy access and a streamlined experience for users looking for various script utilities.

title: Palyra
subtitle: Privacy-First P2P Messaging Platform
description: A modern peer-to-peer messaging platform that combines end-to-end encrypted messaging, video calls, and server-based chat rooms. Built with privacy and security at its core.
features: End-to-end encrypted peer-to-peer messaging.
Video calls with no intermediary servers.
Server-based chat rooms for group communication.
Privacy and security as foundational design principles.
MIT licensed and open source.

title: Soundboard API
subtitle: Zero-Hardcoded REST API
description: A zero-hardcoded REST API built on Cloudflare Pages Functions that dynamically sources all sound data from the genizy/soundboard GitHub repository.
features: Zero-Hardcoded: All sound data is dynamically sourced from the genizy/soundboard GitHub repository.
Cloudflare Pages Functions: Built on Cloudflare Pages Functions for fast and reliable API responses.
Dynamic Sound Data: All sound data is dynamically sourced from the genizy/soundboard GitHub repository.

title: Cyron
subtitle: Privacy-Focused Meta Search Engine
description: A privacy-focused meta search engine API powered by SearX. Returns structured results across web, images, videos, news, music, files, social media, science, and IT — with full filtering support.
features: Privacy-Focused Backend: Aggregates results from multiple SearX instances, ensuring user privacy and anonymity.
Modern UI: A clean, glassmorphism-inspired design with light and dark themes.
Advanced Search Filters: Filter results by image size, time range, and a toggle for Safe Search.

title: Ovala
subtitle: Sophisticated Web Proxy
description: A sophisticated web proxy that allows users to bypass internet censorship and access blocked content freely. Built on the powerful Node Unblocker engine.

title: Youtube Video Scraper
subtitle: YouTube Video Info & Download API
description: A simple Flask API to fetch YouTube video information and provide downloadable links. Includes a mechanism to bypass YouTube's rate-limiting and bot detection using browser cookies.
features: Fully automatic video downloading.
Fetches video title, thumbnail, and available video-only formats.
Downloads videos in selected resolutions (MP4 format).
Handles merging of video and audio streams automatically.
Returns JSON responses for easy integration.

title: Rylox
subtitle: SoundCloud Downloader
description: A streamlined web app that lets you download SoundCloud audio tracks as MP3 files. Choose your preferred quality and save tracks directly to your device with ease.

title: HTML.cafe Discord Webhook Hunter
subtitle: Webhook Privacy Tool
description: Tired of people on HTML.cafe logging you on their webhook without consent? Find and remove exposed webhooks before they're abused.
features: Scans HTML.cafe pages for exposed Discord webhooks.
Identifies webhooks that may be logging visitors without consent.
Helps remove or invalidate exposed webhooks proactively.
Privacy-focused tooling for the HTML.cafe community.

title: Dev Tools Inspector
subtitle: Bookmarklet Dev Toolkit
description: A powerful, lightweight developer toolkit that runs as a bookmarklet on any webpage. Perfect for mobile debugging and situations where traditional dev tools are unavailable.
features: Live Console & JS Execution.
DOM & CSS Rule Inspector.
Network & Application Loggers.
Fully draggable and resizable panel.

title: Monitor Uptime
subtitle: GitHub Actions Uptime Monitor
description: An open-source uptime monitoring and status page project powered by GitHub Actions. An efficient way to track the availability of your services without external dependencies.
